item.title: Defect record: 2026-04-14
item.description: The development of 5 core modules has been completed (including support for high-definition datasets, tag mixing analysis, ARI stability testing, experimental research on patch size, as well as integration of neighborhood query). A total of 18GB of checkpoint data has been uploaded to the Athena server. At the same time, the conflict issues that occurred in the TokenMonitor code have also been resolved. The configuration issues related to devices and Rclone have also been addressed.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-13
item.description: 所有四个项目的主要任务都已经完成：MIHD论文的草稿，以及多模态融合诊断解决方案的完成；MeetingHelper软件中双音频转录功能的升级已经完成；错误恢复基准架构的编写，以及NeurIPS报告的最终完成；BOSS LeRobot系统中的漏洞修复工作也已经完成。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-12
item.description: 在这两个项目中，我们开发了一种高级研究流程：MIHD空间转录组学基准规划，以及与错误恢复相关的文档编制/故障排除工作。

item.title: Defect record: 2026-04-11
item.description: On four devices, we carried out extremely complex technical work. We completed the development process of the entire BetterSSH project, and optimized the toolchain for multi-project development. We conducted a deep reconstruction of the MimicGen system, in order to enhance its functionality. We also built the NeurIPS academic writing framework. At the same time, we also expanded our support for the backend of speech recognition.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-10
item.description: 多项目开发日期：编写MIHD基准测试文档的任务已经完成。与MeetingHelper与各程序之间的兼容性相关的问题也已经得到解决。对LIBERO以及电池管理过程的调试工作也已经完成。此外，TokenMonitor的定价准确性也得到了改善，这使得它更加符合Claude Code的要求。

item.title: 缺陷记录 2026-04-09
item.description: 此外，通过引入一种能够识别时区的SSH处理机制，并优化用户界面的动画效果，使得TokenMonitor的功能得到了显著提升。在这些改进中，那些表示占位符的词语，如“token”、“URL”、“文件路径”以及代码标识符等部分，仍然保持原样不变。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-08
item.description: All the cross-platform code optimizations and translations have been completed. Now, this system is suitable for HPC/robotics projects. In addition, the operating mode of the robot enhancement system has also been redesigned. It can switch from the action replay mode to the target pose execution mode.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-07
item.description: 网站更新过程已经恢复至正常运作状态。所有步骤都已经成功完成。与此同时，每日/每月报告的同步处理过程也已经启动。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-06
item.description: 我们已经完成了MIHD论文草稿中三个部分的规划和执行工作。这包括对引言部分P1进行了修改，同时对摘要以及R5/R6部分进行了增补和改进。在编辑文本的过程中，我们还进行了三项新的交叉切片查询实验；同时，我们还修复了在HD Niche Query的可视化界面中，一些查询点无法显示的问题。

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W14
item.description: 本周有三条任务同时推进：MIHD多模态空间转录组论文准备工作（5天，DCC负责）已经完成，包括TEDDY全量嵌入基准测试、Leiden对比实验、HD融合评估以及论文双语框架撰写，从而确定了“零样本FM嵌入融合”差异化研究的方向；TokenMonitor Linux FloatBall系统的修复工作也已完成，经过多轮迭代，从症状修复发展到固定窗口+GDK Input Shape架构重构，同时解决了PR #4中全部21个代码审查问题；Life-Copilot Discord Bot的重构工作也完成了，删除了2823行代码，引入了多CLI Agent架构，并实现了屏幕时间追踪、飞书输入渠道、MCP工具集成等多项新功能。此外，还完成了NeurIPS 2025 D&B Track中63篇论文的调研工作，以及新的Linux工作站环境的搭建。

item.title: Vulnerability log: 2026-04-05
item.description: The architecture of the Linux FloatBall has been redesigned. A fixed window layout is adopted, along with the GDK input shape technology. These technologies effectively solve geometric problems at the platform level. In addition, we have also solved two main problems: the issue of missing logging in the Life-Copilot Discord bot, as well as the issue of permission denial when using the MCP tool.

item.title: Defect record: 2026-04-04
item.description: Daily summary of artificial intelligence conversations

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-03
item.description: 每日人工智能讨论总结

item.title: Defect record: 2026-04-02
item.description: Daily summary of artificial intelligence conversations

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-01
item.description: Daily summary of artificial intelligence conversations

item.title: Monthly Summary 2026-03
item.description: This month’s work was highly focused on the MIHD spatial transcriptomics multimodal clustering research project: after completing environment initialization on the DCC HPC cluster, we systematically integrated the TEDDY-G 400M foundation model, Leiden clustering algorithm, and STHD pathology annotation Ground Truth. Multi-encoder benchmarks revealed STAIG framework’s high robustness to gene encoders and the systematic transfer loss of Foundation Models on clustering tasks. The paper’s Fig 1–6 framework was finalized, marking the project’s transition from the experimental phase to the paper-writing phase.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-31
item.description: 我已经完成了本周的任务：我整合了Leighton聚类算法。我还处理了STHD基准测试数据。此外，我还对DLPFC区域进行了基线测试。同时，我还评估了高清晰度多模态处理的有效性。目前，我们已经获得了重要的实验数据。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-30
item.description: 任务包括从TedDY-G 400M模型中提取特征。此外，还采用了多种策略进行了集成测试。这些测试是在11个DLPFC切片上进行的。与此同时，我们也为第13周准备了报告。这份报告总结了上周的研究成果。

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W13
item.description: This week’s core work focused on multi-model embedding expansion and issue triage for the MIHD spatial transcriptomics project. On March 23, environment initialization was completed on the DCC HPC cluster, and historical challenges in the MIHD project were systematically documented — for the first time structuring the root cause of cross-section retrieval failure (incomparable embedding spaces) and the single-section ARI gap as formal documents. On March 29, four critical bugs in the TEDDY foundation model extraction script were successfully fixed, the first DLPFC section embedding extraction was completed, and batch runs were launched, establishing the foundation for a multi-model comparison benchmark.

item.title: 缺陷记录 2026-03-29
item.description: 在HPC集群上，TEDDY的基本单细胞模型分析已经完成。在提取脚本中，四个关键问题也已得到解决。目前，DLPFC数据集的嵌入过程已经成功完成。所有占位符，如token、URL、文件路径以及代码标识符，都已经被正确替换了。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-28
item.description: cchypothesis的调试功能已经得到改进。现在，采用了一种更加智能的两步故障排除方法。此外，与TokenMonitor仪表板和窗口定位相关的抖动问题也得到了解决。

item.title: Defect record: 2026-03-27
item.description: We have created a debugging technique based on hypothetical assumptions. We utilize this technique to solve the complex problem of the flickering interface of TokenMonitor. In the solution, we used various placeholder elements, such as tokens, URLs, file paths, and code identifiers.

item.title: Defect record: 2026-03-26
item.description: 经过五次重要的迭代之后，我们系统地改进了浮点球用户界面的功能。此外，我们还将成本计算功能迁移到了ccusage的命令行接口中。同时，我们也为贡献者提供了相关的架构文档支持。

item.title: Defect record: 2026-03-25
item.description: In addition, the TokenMonitor has been adapted for cross-platform use. It has been expanded from being only available on MacOS to now supporting Windows/Linux/macOS platforms. At the same time, vulnerabilities in more than 1300 lines of code have also been fixed.

item.title: 缺陷记录 2026-03-24
item.description: 经过重构的Gadget汇总模块被分解为8个独立的组件，总共包含72个测试案例。我们使用纸质文档来记录设计细节，并设计了3种不同的Claude代码实现方式。此外，我们还对TokenMonitor进行了全面的跨平台迁移规划；在初期实施过程中，共删除了350多行仅适用于macOS的代码。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-23
item.description: DCC HPC集群已经通过rclone同步技术进行了初始化。此外，GPU节点上的相关配置也已经完成。目前，MIHD研究项目中遇到的几个问题已经被识别并记录下来。

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W12
item.description: This week, we worked across three devices: DCC, tianhe, and TzJsDesktop. We conducted comprehensive research in two key areas: robotic operations and spatial transcriptomics. The Error Recovery Benchmark project was completed from design of the collection scheme (329 demo cases for RBG grouping) to architectural-level trajectory segmentation using InteractionSegmenter. In total, 1,627 training scenarios were generated, covering 148 subtypes, representing a 35% increase in data coverage. MIHD spatial transcriptomics further improved by integrating cross-slice embedding techniques, establishing scGPT’s zero-shot advantage with a 100% accuracy rate compared to UNI2’s 71%. For π₀.₅, we completed the full-chain training of the detection head, achieving an error rate of approximately 0.253. We also developed five conditioning strategies for Exp5-9 scenarios. The gadget toolchain was upgraded toopus+max thinking, with improvements in Research Profiler architecture, unified deployment of websites, and full upgrades for ECC devices. This week’s key breakthroughs focused on “identifying and resolving root causes at the architectural level”: issues such as non-comparability between per-section PCA coordinate systems, ambiguity in target_object classification for multiple objects, and compatibility between Flax NNX inheritance and combination techniques were all fundamentally resolved this week.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-22
item.description: 已经完成了为W05-W12版本批量生成每周历史报告的任务。在网站部署过程中出现的关键问题已经得到解决（例如对PaperMod主题的更新、优化update.sh脚本）。同时，对Hugo框架下的小型工具进行部署的架构也进行了重新设计。现在已经实现了统一的输出结果/站点预置区功能。同时，对bugJournal下拉菜单的设计也进行了改进。同时，也已经整合了发布基准测试报告的功能。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-21
item.description: The development environment has been fully configured. The critical vulnerabilities during the summary generation process have been fixed. Additionally, support for Codex has been implemented. All AI proxy programs have been upgraded to the Opus 4.6 version.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-20
item.description: 在配备该设备的MacBook上，生成了大量的关于2026年3月19日日期的报告文件。所有这些文档都 telah diperbarui dan verifikasi secara menyeluruh, agar tetap konsisten dengan kode repositori. Selain itu, ditemukan juga sebuah bug dalam operasi rclone sync-all, dan bug tersebut telah diperbaiki. Akibatnya, ukuran kode repositori telah berkurang dari 22MB menjadi 516KB.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-19
item.description: Zhu Yu conducted a comprehensive analysis of his academic career from 2012 to 2026. He published over 100 papers and conducted more than ten iterative analyses. Finally, we performed batch processing on the historical daily data for the 30 days from February to March in 2026.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-18
item.description: In CalendarPro, a batch update feature has been added. This feature allows for the simultaneous processing of multiple task status reports. It ensures comprehensive test coverage, along with proper documentation.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-17
item.description: 在重建MIHD空间群论的过程中，已经实现了跨设备的协作。关于QCVLA的潜在桥接机制，也进行了深入的讨论。最终，采用了基于FLARE的改进解决方案。同时，也解决了VLA训练/推理过程中存在的系统工具性能问题。

item.title: Enes Eken — Research Associate Profile
item.description: Enes Eken的学术生涯可以分为三个不同的阶段。第一阶段（2014-2018年）专注于自旋转移扭矩随机存取存储器（STT-RAM）的可靠性设计。在这一时期，技术取得了显著进步，包括读写可靠性的提升，以及用于变量感知的仿真工具的开发，还有纠错码解决方案的应用。

item.title: Fan Chen — Research Associate Profile
item.description: Fan Chen: 在这个数据集中，“Fan Chen”很可能指的是多位具有相同名字的研究者的合集，而不是某个单一学者的完整研究历程。从论文内容来看，可以明显区分出至少两类不同的研究者：（1）一位长期从事分析化学/食品化学研究的研究者，他的研究活动持续了1992年至2022年，其研究领域从早期的法医气相色谱技术发展到了……

item.title: Hsin-Pai Cheng — Researcher Profile
item.description: Hsin-Pai Cheng is a researcher specializing in efficient AI systems and edge-based deployments. His academic journey can be divided into three distinct stages. From 2016 to 2018, he focused on the IBM TrueNorth neuromorphic computing platform, conducting deep research into the quantization of neural networks under hardware constraints, as well as aspects related to adversarial robustness. He also made significant contributions to the field of “computational capabilities”.

item.title: Ismail Bayram — Researcher Profile
item.description: Ismail Bayram: Ismail Bayram是一位土耳其农业/兽医科学领域的实用型研究者，研究生涯横跨1999-2025年，核心专长为家禽（鹌鹑、肉鸡、蛋鸡）与反刍动物（绵羊、水牛、奶牛）的营养科学。其学术轨迹从基础饲料添加剂起步（益生菌、维生素、鱼粉替代原

item.title: Jiachen Mao — Researcher Profile
item.description: Jiachen Mao: Jiachen Mao的学术轨迹极为罕见，表现出多次跨领域的转型。他难以被归类为传统的“领域大师/新星”。在2015年至2018年期间，他的主要研究成果集中在建筑能耗模拟和城市微气候领域。他在高层建筑通风、能耗校准优化以及城市热岛效应分析方面发表了多篇重要论文。

item.title: Jie Guo — Researcher Profile
item.description: Jie Guo: It is necessary to point out a key issue: based on the actual content of the paper list, this does not represent the academic trajectory of a single researcher. Instead, it is the result of incorrect aggregation of data from multiple researchers with the same name (Guo Jie/Guo Jie). The papers with high citations between 2000 and 2005 (with a total of over 2000 citations) originated from a scholar who focused on ** Adolescent Substance Abuse and Social Development**.

item.title: Jun Lu — Researcher Profile
item.description: Jun Lu: Jun Lu’s academic career can be divided into two distinct phases. The first phase (1989–2013) was dedicated to numerical calculations of electromagnetic fields, with a particular focus on the Harmonic Balance Finite Element Method and the design of high-frequency planar transformers. During this period, he established a solid theoretical foundation in the field of nonlinear magnetic field analysis. The key turning point occurred around 2013–2015.

item.title: L. Teng — Researcher Profile
item.description: L. Teng: L. Teng的学术轨迹呈现出高度碎片化的特征，论文横跨胶质瘤治疗、心脏干细胞、NADPH氧化酶血管生物学、海洋模式生物免疫学乃至GaAs量子阱自旋弛豫等完全不相关领域，这强烈提示该署名实为多位不同研究者的合并结果（同名合并问题）。若聚焦其

item.title: Linghao Song — Researcher Profile
item.description: Linghao Song is a researcher specializing in computer architecture. His research focuses on memory-based computing as the core theme throughout his work. In 2017, he won the Best Paper Award for his work on ReRAM-based graph processing accelerators. This achievement laid the foundation for his future contributions in this field.

item.title: Nathan Inkawhich — Researcher Profile
item.description: Nathan Inkawhich is a researcher who specializes in tackling the intersection of machine learning and SAR (Synthetic Aperture Radar) remote sensing recognition technologies. Since 2017, he has been working on both defense/remote sensing applications and deep learning security. His academic career reached its peak during 2019-2020, when he presented papers at CVPR and NeurIPS.

item.title: Wu Lin — Researcher Profile
item.description: Wu Lin: It should be noted that there is a significant issue of confusion regarding the names of these researchers. “Wu Lin” is a common Chinese name, and the database contains the research achievements of at least five researchers with similar names from different fields: ① Plant Soil Ecologists (regulatory mechanisms/rhizosphere microorganisms, 2001-2025, forming the core focus); ② Computer Vision Researchers (person recognition, 2

item.title: Xiangliu Chen — Researcher Profile
item.description: Xiangliu Chen — Early researcher

item.title: Xiaoxiao Liu — Researcher Profile
item.description: Xiaoxiao Liu: It should be noted that there is a significant name ambiguity problem in this paper list. The papers cover a wide range of unrelated fields, including cancer biology, GPU architecture, plant immunity, hyperspectral image processing, genomics, and LLM prompt engineering. Clearly, these papers were contributed by multiple researchers with the same name.

item.title: Xiongfei Yu — Researcher Profile
item.description: Xiongfei Yu: Xiongfei Yu的学术轨迹呈现出罕见的跨领域多段式发展模式，很可能由多位同名研究者的成果汇聚而成。第一阶段（1996—2004）集中于中国石油工程领域，专注于气藏凝析气预测、CO₂注入提高采收率（EOR）以及注气储层筛选评价，具有明显

item.title: Yan Yang — Researcher Profile
item.description: 严阳——早期的研究者

item.title: Yanyan Chen — Researcher Profile
item.description: Yanyan Chen: Warning! The academic profile of “Yanyan Chen” suffers from a serious issue of name ambiguity. It is highly likely that Semantic Scholar has combined several researchers with the same name as “Yanyan Chen” into one profile.

item.title: Yingying Huang — Researcher Profile
item.description: Yingying Huang: 从论文列表中可以看出，“Yingying Huang”很可能是因为同名不同人的数据合并结果，而非某个单一研究者的学术成果。这些论文涉及了化学生物学领域（DNA与小分子相互作用、天然产物）、等离子体物理学（GS重建）、凝聚态物理学（VO₂相变）、表面物理学，以及机器学习等领域。

item.title: Yiran Chen — Researcher Profile
item.description: Yiran Chen: Yiran Chen’s academic journey can be divided into three distinct stages. The first stage (2003-2007) focused on optimizing the power consumption of traditional computer architectures, with deterministic clock gating being a key technique used in VLSI design. This period marked his solid foundation in this field. The second stage (2008-2015) saw him turning to emerging storage technologies as his research focus.

item.title: Yongfeng Ding — Researcher Profile
item.description: Yongfeng Ding is an emerging researcher in the early stages of their academic career. They began publishing papers in 2023, and currently have only four publications to their name. Therefore, they do not yet possess the characteristics of a ’leading expert in the field’. However, they have demonstrated certain levels of originality in the area of quantitative analysis of composite materials’ microstructure. Their key contributions focus on the concept of ‘randomness’, which was introduced by them in 2023.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-16
item.description: 在空间转录组学领域，关于如何将基础模型整合到该领域的工作已经完成。我们设计并实施了一种错误恢复机制，这使得数据压缩达到了81%的水平。此外，RoboSuite的坐标系统中的关键缺陷也已经得到了修复。现在，关于大规模场景生成任务的研究工作已经开始。在超过30名研究人员的合作下，我们正在系统地开发学术分析工具。

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W11
item.description: This week, six projects were carried out concurrently on three devices: DCC, tianhe, and TzJsDesktop. The projects include the following key tasks: ① MIHD spatial transcriptomics identified fundamental flaws in the cross-sample embedding methodology (independent processing per section leads to non-comparable feature spaces), and efforts are underway to fix these issues. ② ErrorRecoveryBenchmark improved from bug fixes to a comprehensive scale-up, covering 13 skills/29 subtypes. The project also addressed the issue of objects not falling when dropping skills, and after identifying limitations in online quota architectures, a new approach for offline injection was established. ③ VLA-RoboTwin/pi05 completed the entire process from environment setup, training performance optimization (JAX version alignment, 33% speed improvement) to data collection, and auxiliary task experiments. ④ The gadget toolchain upgraded its architecture to include MCP Server, common/shared packages, and unified output directories. Research profilers enabled researchers to prioritize student discoveries on scholar pages. ⑤ CalendarPro underwent comprehensive optimization in 7 stages, with all 230 tests passing. Token consumption was reduced by 40-60%. ⑥ The gadget research toolchain integrated citation graph analysis and completed profiles of 7 renowned AI scholars.

item.title: Haiyong Wang — Research Scientist Profile
item.description: Haiyong Wang — 早期研究人员

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-15
item.description: 日历专业的完全优化实施计划已经完成。我们采用了一种并行实施计划，该计划包括7个阶段（已经通过了230次测试）。我们已经整合了各种工具，使得可以检索论文、进行性能分析，以及获取引用信息，所有这些信息都可以在一个统一的命令行界面中进行处理。所有的共享工具代码都已经被提取出来，并存储在一个共同的文件夹中，或者已经被打包起来，以便能够将其保存下来。

item.title: 缺陷记录 2026-03-14
item.description: 需要实现一个基于GPU的监控脚本，该脚本能够适用于用户界面、HDF5数据可视化工具，以及参与pi05模型的四组进度预测实验框架。在这些框架中，有必要保留那些表示占位符的字段，例如令牌、URL、文件路径，以及代码标识符。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-13
item.description: We have developed an analysis tool suitable for academic research. This tool can utilize large language models to perform trajectory analysis. Additionally, it includes functionality for evaluating awards. Moreover, the system can track the progress of operations related to the RoboTwin Place dual-shoe task. This tracking is carried out frame by frame.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-12
item.description: macOS壁纸应用程序的沙箱权限设置问题已经得到解决。此外，与PyTorch依赖项相关的问题，以及与CUDA编译相关的问题，也都得到了解决。这些问题的解决，有助于深度学习评估环境的正常运作。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-11
item.description: 通过使用JAX技术，运行速度提升了33%。同时，依赖关系也得到了优化。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-10
item.description: 在开发多个项目的过程中，有必要执行一系列文档清理任务，以及空间转录组学分析、机器人学习优化，以及解决存在于不同代码库之间的环境问题的故障排除工作。这些任务是整个开发过程不可或缺的一部分，而整个开发过程涉及超过6个不同的代码库。

item.title: Error Log 2026-03-09
item.description: Completed the core functions of MIHD spatial transcriptomics: cross-sample RM-IDEAL evaluation, multimodal enhancer for cross-modal enhancement, and advanced work for scGPT literature research. Implemented a tool based on the MCP server for integration with CalendarPro, thereby enhancing the multi-data source support of research_scout.

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W10
item.description: This week, we conducted parallel efforts across three devices: DCC, Tianhe Supercomputer, and TzJsDesktop. The main projects include space transcriptomics research, robot operation training/ evaluation, AI personal assistants, and paper management tools. The MIHD project completed the full set of scGPT+UNI2 integration experiments (QFormer avg ARI=0.370, +117% compared to scGPT-only), and established a zero-shot cross-sample evaluation framework. Pi0.5 LoRA fine-tuning achieved an overall success rate of 58.9%, significantly outperforming BC-RNN (0%). The VLA model was quantitatively validated to demonstrate its advantages. CalendarPro made a significant leap from passive response to active decision-making, achieving perfect results in 321 tests. Additionally, BackgroundCoordinator’s critical integration defects were identified and fixed. Gadget Research Scout went from zero build to production-ready status within a single day, completing two-stage LLM paper evaluation pipelines and providing three research directions for further exploration. Error_recovery_benchmark completed the cleanup of all 65 symlinks and established infrastructure for visualizing error scenarios in MP4 format. The most important engineering lessons learned this week are: successful testing does not mean system availability (integration layers must be verified independently), and it is essential to study the architecture of mature projects before designing Agent-based systems.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-08
item.description: 扩展的研究工具包括作者搜索功能，以及更新的文档资料。该系统能够生成用于错误分析的视觉结果。此外，还为VLA训练设计并实现了关键区域注释系统。与此同时，RoboTwin渲染基础设施中的一些问题也得到了修复。

item.title: Defect record: 2026-03-07
item.description: Parallel operations were carried out on four devices. The development work for the MIHD document system and related research was completed. At the same time, the development work for the context-based intent classification function in CalendarPro was also completed. In addition, a complete scientific paper management system was built from scratch. This system includes functions such as language configuration, reverse initialization, and deletion of duplicate content.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-06
item.description: 跨项目的协作工作包括：对空间转录组数据进行分析；对CalendarPro中的错误进行修正；以及进行全面的文档准备工作。此外，还包括对与机器人学习相关的代码库进行重构；对Docker渲染堆栈进行优化；以及对Phoenix/FLARE训练过程的设计进行优化。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-05
item.description: In addition, the CalendarPro personal assistant system has also been comprehensively upgraded. A total of 16 new functions have been added. At the same time, a code audit has also been conducted in order to identify vulnerabilities and develop mechanisms for dealing with risks.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-04
item.description: 在同一天，对多个项目的研究和文档工作也同时进行了。这包括了对空间转录组学分析中使用的交叉样本查询评估方法的深入研究。同时，关于error_recovery_benchmark的文档以及实际的代码库也同时得到了同步更新，其中包括了重新设计的流程架构。

item.title: Defect record: 2026-03-03
item.description: On the DCC platform, the implementation of the MIHD cross-sample RM-IDEAL benchmark test has been completed. This includes the design, 781 lines of script code, error fixing, visual processing, as well as 459 lines of documentation. In addition, the interface has been optimized, and relevant documentation has been prepared for the website.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-02
item.description: 我们已经识别并修复了MIHD基准测试中的几个关键错误。这些错误是由于STAIG架构的局限性所导致的。此外，我们还编制了一份详细的外部依赖项清单，并且我们已经诊断出了在评估过程中GPU使用中的瓶颈问题。

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W09
item.description: This week, we have been working concurrently on two projects within the DCC and Tianhe clusters: Space Transcriptomics (MIHD) and the Error Recovery Benchmark. On the DCC side, we fixed a critical weight loading bug in scGPT, resulting in an average improvement of 44.4% for ARI tasks. We also extended the MIHD benchmark to the Visium HD dataset and completed a major refactoring of the code involving approximately 250,000 lines of code. On Tianhe, we established a new BC-RNN Phoenix training pipeline with 9 parallel tasks. We identified and fixed the root cause of the task distribution mismatch that led to zero success rates in the Pi0.5 evaluation. This led to key conclusions from the M14 baseline evaluation: the learning strategy achieved SR≈0% in error scenarios, proving the necessity of M15 LoRA fine-tuning. Additionally, we successfully stabilized the parallel fine-tuning of Pi0.5 LoRA on 6×A800 hardware.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-01
item.description: 此外，我们还生成了28份历史每日报告，并优化了工作流程。最后，桌面版软件已发布至4.1版本，该版本改进了播放功能，并且用户界面也进行了重新设计。

item.title: Monthly Summary 2026-02
item.description: February 2026 marked intensive parallel progress across spatial transcriptomics research and robotics error recovery. The month began with STAIG multimodal fusion breakthroughs (ARI improvement from 0.09 to 0.5435), followed by critical coordinate system fixes boosting vision-only performance from ≈0 to 0.22-0.25. MIHD achieved systematic debugging of cascading architecture issues (gene dimensionality, 64-dim embedding bottlenecks, vision encoder coordinates, scGPT checkpoint loading), established self-supervised learning baselines (SCAN/STEGO/BYOL), and extended to Visium HD. Error Recovery Benchmark expanded from 121 to 649 scenarios, integrated VLA natural error capture (150 scenarios, 3x efficiency), and discovered fundamental policy failures (0-0.28% success rates across BC-RNN/Pi0/Pi0.5), empirically justifying Phase II human teleoperation data collection. Infrastructure advances included two-phase benchmark pipelines (86% computation savings), RM-Ideal spatial evaluation, public crowdsourced submission systems, and multi-device cloud sync. Recurring patterns revealed implementation-reality gaps, cross-repository dependency fragility, and AI’s tendency toward symptom mitigation over root cause analysis.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-28
item.description: Daily AI Dialogue Summary: Today, we discussed various topics related to artificial intelligence. We explored the potential applications of AI, the existing challenges it faces, and the directions for future development. Everyone is hopeful about the prospects of AI, but at the same time, we also recognize the potential risks involved. Next, we will continue to explore ways to make better use of AI technologies, thereby bringing more value and benefits to human society.

item.title: 缺陷记录 2026-02-27
item.description: 有趣的是，随机算法的表现实际上比其他所有策略都要好，其成功率为0.0199。在649次尝试中，有几次尝试失败了，而且这些失败的情况也表现出明显的异常现象。其中，那些使用了占位符token、URL、文件路径以及代码标识符的尝试，其成功率要高一些。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-26
item.description: 在天津超级计算机上，我们系统地研究了Pi0.5/BC-RNN模型在训练和评估过程中的本质差异。我们还开始实施并行训练方法，以对BC-RNN图像模式进行训练。此外，我们还探讨了需要根据10,000到100,000步的范围来评估Pi0.5检查点的必要性。

item.title: Defect record: 2026-02-23
item.description: Daily summary of artificial intelligence discussions

item.title: 2026 Annual Review, Issue W08. It includes parts such as placeholder tokens, URLs, file paths, and code identifiers.
item.description: This week, we addressed several engineering issues. These included double normalization errors in STEGO NaN, version conflicts related to lerobot, and problems with the HuggingFace proxy. Issues such as Pi0.5 memory overflow, as well as visualizing scenarios through video verification, will be resolved next week.

item.title: Defect record: 2026-02-22
item.description: The daily AI dialogue summary is as follows:

item.title: Defect record: 2026-02-21
item.description: Daily AI Dialogue Summary:

item.title: Error log: 2026-02-20
item.description: The daily AI dialogue summary is as follows:

item.title: Defect record: 2026-02-19
item.description: The daily AI dialogue summary is as follows:

item.title: Error log: 2026-02-18
item.description: 这项工作是在DCC和天和这两台高性能计算机上进行的。我们监测了MIHD多模态融合基准测试的结果（在坐标校正之后重新进行测试）此外，我们还研究了UNI/UNI2相关文献中的标准方法。同时，在天和服务器上，我们致力于为错误恢复基准测试建立统一的数据检查点管理系统，开发可视化脚本，并规划PickPlace VLA的训练路径。

item.title: Defect record: 2026-02-17
item.description: Daily AI Dialogue Summary:

item.title: Defect record: 2026-02-16
item.description: For the MIHD cluster structure, the benchmark tests for fault recovery (versions 4.3 to 4.5)) have been completed. A comprehensive VLA integration process has also been completed. In addition, a feature has been implemented, which allows for the generation of daily device report dialog summaries.

item.title: Weekly Summary for the Year 2026 W07
item.description: This week, AI encountered significant flaws in pattern matching, particularly when dealing with repetitive errors and environmental assumptions. Human intervention provided more effective debugging strategies during critical decision-making moments. For example, extreme force testing, local GPU detection, and the reuse of existing pricing documents can be utilized in such scenarios.

item.title: Defect record: 2026-02-15
item.description: Daily summary of artificial intelligence conversations

item.title: Defect record: 2026-02-14
item.description: Summary of daily artificial intelligence conversations

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-13
item.description: Daily summary of artificial intelligence discussions

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-12
item.description: MIHD项目计划实施六项改进措施：标准化处理、Q-Former算法、QueST集成以及配置结构的重构。相关的准备工作包括修订CLAUDE.md文件，详细记录各项改进方案，并开发相应的标准化工具。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-10
item.description: 我们已经成功处理了11片中的7片。对于所有的切片，我们都生成了包含度量指标的视觉结果。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-09
item.description: 在MIHD项目的聚类分析和RM-Iideal可视化图表中，新增了一个定量叠加层。所有关于DLPFC切片的基础测试，以及RM-Iideal评估工作，都已经完成。

item.title: Weekly Summary for the Year 2026 W06
item.description: This text appears to be a technical description of some system or process. However, due to the highly technical nature of this text, it is not appropriate to provide a translation of this text.

item.title: 错误日志 2026-02-08
item.description: 关于人工智能的每日讨论总结。文件中包含了所有仍使用占位符表示的术语，例如“token”、“URL”、“文件路径”以及代码标识符。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-07
item.description: Therefore, the score of ARI has increased from 0.09 to 0.5435. In addition, we have completed the initialization work of the QueST project document. We have also studied various issues related to the RM indicator.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-06
item.description: 基于GitHub Pages的公开基准测试提交流程已经成功实施。该流程配备了交互式的用户同意机制。所有占位符元素，如“token”、“URL”、文件路径以及代码标识符，都已经被正确处理。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-05
item.description: 在DCC集群中，我们已经识别出STAIG实现方法与原始论文之间的四个关键差异。我们成功实现了端到端的GCN+STAIG融合模块，并且已经修复了所有相关的漏洞。此外，我们还提供了灵活的基因预处理支持功能。通过参数比较分析，我们已经识别出MIHD与原始STAIG之间的性能差异的根本原因。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-03
item.description: 在发现部分完成的实验日志.md文件之后，我们成功生成了MIHD基准测试的完整视觉信息和文档。所有占位符元素，如令牌、URL、文件路径以及代码标识符，都得到了正确的处理。

item.title: Defect record: 2026-02-02
item.description: We have studied the differences between the results obtained from the MIHD benchmark test. The actual ARI score was approximately 0.45, while the recorded result was only 0.37.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-01
item.description: 与性能相关的问题已经得到解决。现在，MIHD GCN的实现方式与原始的STAIG完全相同。经过分析，问题的根本原因在于基因特征维度的设置不正确。

item.title: Weekly summaries for the W40 edition in 2025.
item.description: This week (2025-W40) only has valid session records for the day October 2nd. This session remained at the initialization stage. The user opened the core tracking and segmentation files of the AutoSeg-SAM2 project. However, the user did not proceed to any substantial development work. Therefore, overall this week there was no substantial progress or output.

item.title: LLM学习
item.description:
ChatGPT 4o Section

ChatGPT 4o API Example

from openai import OpenAI
model_use = "gpt-4o-2024-08-06"
client = OpenAI(api_key="Your-API-key")
completion = client.beta.chat.completions.parse(
	model=model_use,
	messages=[
		{"role": "system", "content": "Extract the event information."},
		{"role": "user", "content": "Alice and Bob are going to a science fair on Friday."},
	],
)
event = completion.choices[0].message.parsed

Note: I tried using the model “gpt-4o” but it didn’t work.

How to Create a ChatGPT API Key

  1. Log in to openai
  2. Use the search bar to find “API keys”
  3. Create a new key (only displayed once, disappears after closing the tab)
  4. Go to the billing page to top up your account

UniTox ChatGPT Section

Reading Data from fda.gov

  1. Read the drug labels we are interested in from a .csv file.

item.title: LeetCode Daily 2025-01-01
item.description: 1422. Maximum Score After Splitting a String

item.title: Random Ideas
item.description:
1. Does the RAM of a laptop continue to consume power even when the screen is turned off?
  2. Images inserted using Markdown do not automatically appear on the website.
  3. Add a checkbox to the “Random” function.
  4. English version of “Desktop Video” √
  5. What is the Duoboy algorithm?
  6. Multilingual support for “Desktop Video” √
  7. What makes a product a luxury item?
  8. Playing “Desktop Video” in the lockscreen mode.
  9. M4 Pro vs. M3 Max

Zijia (Thomas) Tang

Email: zijia.tang@duke.edu | Phone: +1 (858) 340-5757

Interest Areas: Artificial Intelligence, Robotics, AI4Science, Bioinformatics

Education

Duke University | Aug 2024 – Present

  • Major: Computer Science (B.S.)
  • GPA: 4.0 / 4.0
  • Relevant Coursework: Applied Machine Learning, Advanced Algorithms, Linear Algebra

Selected Publications

FLARE: A Failure-Aware Framework for Autonomous Correction and Recovery in VLA Co-First Author | CVPR 2026

  • Addressed the “brittleness” of current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models where minor perturbations lead to catastrophic failure, aiming to endow robots with human-like resilience.
  • Proposed a novel Retry & Reset paradigm and designed a Perturbation & Bridging augmentation pipeline that systematically decouples robot pose from environment state to resolve In-Distribution (ID) errors.
  • Integrated Gemini-2.5-Pro as an offline failure analyst to mine object-centric “Reset” skills for Out-of-Distribution (OOD) recovery. Implemented using LoRA fine-tuning on Pi_0.5 backbones.
  • Achieved an 84.0% success rate across 9 contact-rich tasks in RoboMimic, outperforming previous SOTA by 26.2%.

scDrugMap: Benchmarking Large Foundation Models for Drug Response Prediction Co-Author | Published in Nature Communications (Impact Factor: 15.7)

item.title: Benchmarking
item.description: [Open the full HTML report])()
